home.hero_image_note: * AI-generated simulation for demonstration purposes only.
home_hero_title:
Protecting Senior Dignity
Starting from Fall Prevention
home_hero_subtitle: Using FongAI dynamic skeleton detection to provide precise gait analysis and fall risk prediction.
home_process_subtitle: Click steps below to view our advanced algorithms
home_step1_desc: Precise positioning of 33 key coordinates using MediaPipe deep learning. Filters noise even in cluttered backgrounds for smooth 24fps tracking.
home_step2_desc: Translating visual data into medically recognized SPPB (Short Physical Performance Battery) scores without manual timing errors.
home_step3_desc: Combining historical big data with individual gait patterns to analyze future fall probabilities via pre-trained models.
home_feature_desc: FongAI Technology focuses on preventive medicine, providing industry-leading AI sensing solutions.
home_feat1_desc: Proprietary lightweight models that run smoothly on standard tablets, significantly reducing hardware costs.
home_feat2_desc: Integrated visual monitoring combining portrait storage and skeletal recognition.
home_feat3_desc: Provides standard API interfaces for easy App integration.
home_scenario1_desc: Assisting rehabilitation and geriatric outpatient screening.
home_scenario2_desc: Automated regular assessments to track resident frailty progress.
home_scenario3_desc: Rapid screening for large groups to identify high-risk individuals early.
hero.title:
AI Foresees Risks
Dynamic Fall & Mobility Assessment System for Seniors
hero.desc: FongAI combines AI dynamic skeleton analysis with clinical mobility assessment to build a fall risk prediction model for the elderly, helping medical and long-term care institutions create a safer smart care environment.
hero.card1_desc: Real-time detection of elderly gait, balance, and mobility through AI skeleton recognition and motion analysis to build fall risk models.
hero.card2_desc: Established over 50,000 sets of human behavior image data to support AI training and clinical research, providing a trustworthy health data foundation.
hero.card3_desc: Real-time mobility monitoring to detect fall risks early and assist caregivers in timely intervention.
home.app_section_title:
Early Detection of Health Risks
via Skeleton and Gait Data
home.app_section_desc: FongAI utilizes AI skeleton recognition and gait analysis technology to track 17 key skeletal points in real-time, analyzing elderly gait speed, body balance, and postural changes. The system identifies potential mobility decline and postural deviations from daily walking data, providing risk assessments and warnings before falls occur to help caregivers intervene early.
home.app_feat1: Real-time extraction of 17 key skeletal points for analysis
home.app_feat2: Monitors body centerline and offset to evaluate balance
home.app_feat3: Predicts fall and health risks from gait and posture changes
home.tech_title:
From Imaging to Health Insights
AI Gait Analysis Core Technology
home.tech_desc: FongAI utilizes deep learning and human pose recognition to transform standard video into quantifiable mobility health metrics, building fall risk models to help institutions identify risks early.
home.tech_card1_desc: Capture walking footage through a smartphone or tablet camera—no wearables or specialized sensors required.
home.tech_card2_desc_post: in real-time to build comprehensive posture data.
home.tech_card3_desc: Analyzes stride, speed, center of gravity, and balance indices to create personalized mobility health models.
home.tech_card4_desc: Integrates clinical research models for real-time AI assessment of fall risks and early warning alerts.
home.mgmt_title:
Site Management Dashboard
Cross-Site Digital Monitoring
home.mgmt_desc_post: designed for managers. It integrates real-time data from various sites, allowing you to monitor gait analysis and fall risk trends remotely.
home.mgmt_feat1_desc: Easily switch between sites and manage all participant lists under your jurisdiction.
home.mgmt_feat2_desc: Visualize gait data to assist in creating individualized rehabilitation plans.
home.report_main_title:
Comprehensive Data Reports
Precise Insights into Individual Health & Group Risks
home.report_personal_desc: Designed for participants. Converts AI-detected 17 skeleton points into intuitive mobility metrics, tracking subtle changes to create a personal health profile.
home.report_personal_f1_d: Compare historical data to evaluate rehabilitation effectiveness.
home.report_personal_f2_d: Real-time fall warnings for gait instability.
home.report_personal_f3_d: Generate PDF reports for science-based clinical discussions.
home.report_group_desc: Designed for site managers. Aggregates member data to analyze group health trends, aiding in scientific staffing and risk control.
home.report_group_f1_d: Quickly filter high, medium, and low-risk groups within the site.
home.report_group_f2_d: Monitor overall physical changes to prevent group decline.
home.report_group_f3_d: Quantitative reports showing smart care achievements.
home.onboarding_main_title: No Wearables Required, Start with Your Phone
home.onboarding_main_desc: FongAI brings expensive gait labs into daily life. Caregivers can complete professional-grade mobility assessments anytime, anywhere via smartphone or tablet.
home.onboarding_step1_d: No need for specialized hardware or facility renovations. Simply install the app on your existing device to turn it into a high-precision AI detector.
home.onboarding_step2_d: Point the device at the participant, and AI automatically extracts 17 key skeletal points. Works in corridors, living rooms, or clinics without site restrictions.
home.onboarding_step3_d: Once analysis is complete, results and evaluation reports are generated automatically. Export to PDF for medical staff or caregivers to save and reference, making it easy to track mobility trends.
home.cta_title: Start Building Your Smart Care Environment
home.cta_desc: Book a demo to see how FongAI leverages AI technology to enhance care efficiency and reduce fall risks.
about.hero_title_line2: Setting New Standards in Fall Prevention
about.hero_desc: Jianfeng Health Tech specializes in AI and health management, bringing standardized assessments into daily care through FongAI video analysis technology.
about.features_main_subtitle: Driven by preventive medicine to enable early-stage risk management
about.features_f1_d: Based on evidence-based benefits, implementing health promotion and preventive medicine in daily care settings.
about.features_f2_d: Accumulating vast mobility data to provide integrated management solutions for long-term health benefits.
about.features_f3_d: Connecting medical, care, and social welfare resources to build a cross-domain collaborative health service network.
about.timeline_main_subtitle: Advancing AI tech to protect mobility, from Taiwan to the world
about.timeline_2016_d: Obtained 'Patent' for IoT health promotion system and method.
about.timeline_2017_d: Participated in the Senior Physical Fitness Committee of Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
about.timeline_2018_d: Collaborated with Ministry of Labor on senior workforce development projects to initiate large-scale data infrastructure.
about.timeline_2019_l1: Presented at Community Long-term Care Academic Conference
about.timeline_2019_l2: Smart Tech for Healthy Aging & Exercise Workshops
about.timeline_2019_l3: Winner of Social Innovation & Youth Philanthropy Competition
about.timeline_2020_d: Patented 'AI Rehabilitation Detection'. Won 'IT Innovation Award'. Adopted by Gov & Private sectors, covering 50 sites and 4,000+ elder profiles.
about.timeline_2022_d: Partnered with Global Health Forum; scaled to 85 sites and 18,000+ elder video data points.
about.timeline_2023_d: Collaborated with Netherlands, Kansai (Japan), and Shanghai. Reached 120 community sites and 32,000+ AI data profiles.
about.timeline_2024_d: Exhibited at Gerontech Expo. First Prize at 10th AFHC Global Youth Health Forum. Participated in FINDIT matching event.
about.timeline_2025_d: Integrating AI detection with exercise intervention. Invited to World Ageing Festival 2025 (Singapore). Reached 50,000+ services.
tech.hero_desc: Applying the FongAI technology mentioned in 'About Us' at a deeper level. We analyze more than just single movements—through 17 key skeletal points, we achieve clinical-grade automated SPPB assessments.
tech.main_sppb_title: Automated Solution for SPPB Clinical Assessment Metrics
tech.main_sppb_desc: Fully compliant with the SPPB clinical assessment framework, achieving an 86.6% reduction in evaluation time (from 15 minutes to 2 minutes). Powered by AI-driven motion analysis, it delivers precise results within just 2 minutes, significantly enhancing both efficiency and accuracy in clinical assessments.
tech.main_sppb_f1_d: Quantifies center of mass (CoM) trajectory and provides precise postural stability assessment.
tech.main_sppb_f2_d: Accurately calculates stride length and cadence with millisecond-level precision.
tech.main_sppb_f3_d: Analyzes movement biomechanics during standing and evaluates muscular endurance quantitatively.
tech.main_risk_desc: Based on **50,000+** elderly video data trajectories, our model enables early fall risk prediction rather than just reactive detection.
tech.comparison_subtitle: Breaking limits of traditional testing, defining new standards for digital care
tech.comparison_legacy_f1_d: Mostly qualitative descriptions and subjective scoring; highly dependent on experience and prone to error.
tech.comparison_legacy_f2_d: Single-point cross-sectional measurements; difficult to establish long-term continuous tracking.
tech.comparison_jf_f1_d: Converts movement into objective video trajectory data, providing clinical-grade quantitative results.
tech.comparison_jf_f2_d: Cloud-based long-term trend analysis to warn of potential risks through data changes.

product.hero_desc_l1: With pose estimation technology, professional fall risk screening is completed in just 2 minutes.
product.hero_desc_l2: Protecting senior health with next-generation AI solutions for the most precise prevention.
product.feat_fast_d: Real-time analysis in 2 minutes with no wearables required, reducing the burden on seniors.
product.feat_data_d: Automatically generated fall risk assessment reports with clear, easy-to-understand data.
product.feat_auth_d: Complies with clinical fall scale logic, ensuring seamless integration with medical environments.
flow.main_title: One-Stop Service from Detection to Prevention
vivi.hero_desc_p2: accurate evaluation, we match you with an exclusive exercise program. From frailty to wellness, each program is scientifically designed to improve muscle strength and reduce fall risks.
course.hero_desc_p1: Based on individual fall risk assessment results, we provide four major exercise recommendations:
course.hero_desc_p2: assisting seniors in exercising safely, delaying disability, and preventing falls.
prog.aero_d: Improve cardiovascular function and blood circulation through aerobic exercises like brisk walking and rhythmic exercises, the first step in fall prevention.
prog.musc_d: Strengthen lower limbs and core muscle groups to effectively reduce the risk of falling.
prog.bal_d: Enhance core stability and proprioception, key abilities for preventing falls.
prog.flex_d: Increase joint range of motion and body agility to reduce stiffness and the risk of injury.
